cloud_architect_logic: Garbage Collection is crucial for long-running AI memory because it automatically reclaims memory occupied by objects that are no longer needed, preventing memory leaks and reducing the risk of out-of-memory errors. This is particularly important for AI applications, which often involve complex computations and large datasets that can quickly consume vast amounts of memory if not properly managed.
